description: Database cluster 'DB-PROD-01' is unresponsive. Connection timeout errors across all web servers. DevOps team tried to roll back the last migration but the script hung. Customers in North America cannot complete checkout. Log: Error 503 Service Unavailable.

User reports that the printer on the 4th floor (Room 402) is making a grinding noise and leaving black streaks on the paper. Multiple users affected in the Marketing department. Replaced toner but issue persists. Likely a fuser problem.
